title: After spent 30+ hrs building loops...
summary: AI Jason shares a loop engineer template and free course on building AI agents. The resource includes a GitHub repository with codebase harness and knowledge template, plus a step-by-step workshop in the AI Builder Club.
writeup: AI Jason packages the output of 30-plus hours of work on agentic loops into a shareable resource for building AI agents. The release centers on a loop engineer template and a free course, with a GitHub repository that includes a codebase harness and a knowledge template, plus a step-by-step workshop hosted in the AI Builder Club. The focus is the practical scaffolding behind agentic loops and prompt engineering rather than theory.
